narrative: US Dollar firms as resilient Retail Sales and intensifying Fed hike bets drive DXY toward 98.89 — gold lower -1.08%; equities +0.77%; DXY +0.37%; VIX 17.3. GBP/USD tumbles to 1.3411 on political uncertainty, while USD/JPY at 158.25 is anchored by a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage. Options markets show a strong USD/JPY put skew (25d RR -1.69) despite the carry bid. Watch RBNZ Rate Decision on May 27 at 02:00 UTC.
